rationale: All four templates share a consistent 80px margin frame (1120px content width) with clear font-token hierarchy (display-sm title > body-md content > caption source), and grid slots align evenly (KPI columns at 80/472/864 with balanced 56px gutters, split-analysis chart/analysis at 560/520 with a 40px gap). No visible overflow, collision, or hard-fail evidence in the HTML source or manifest, and slot composition is practical for presentation use.
